message:
🐛 Add animate-spin to refresh icons when isRefreshing is true (#10299)

Wire isRefreshing through hooks and add conditional animate-spin class
to RefreshCw icons in 7 card components so users see visual feedback
during background data refreshes.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
